title: erigeron calderae
intro: Erigeron calderae, also known as Calder's fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and calming digestive issues. Erigeron calderae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
